description: A downstream visualization and analysis tool for gene set enrichment results with interactive web visualizer.
author: Felix Wu;Broad Institute
plan:
## ConstellationMap GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
ConstellationMap is a GenePattern module that A downstream visualization and analysis tool for gene set enrichment results with interactive web visualizer.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 8 parameters:
- Required: input.gct.file, input.cls.file, gene.sets.file, top.n, direction, image.format, jaccard.threshold
- Optional: target.class

### 3. Command Line
```
Rscript <libdir>run_ConstellationMap.R <libdir> --input.gct.file\=<input.gct.file> --input.cls.file\=<input.cls.file> --gene.sets.file\=<gene.sets.file> --top.n\=<top.n> --direction\=<direction> --image.format\=<image.format> --jaccard.threshold\=<jaccard.threshold> <target.class>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/docker-r-3-0-conmap

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: input.gct.file
parameters.description: Input gene set enrichment file. Expected to be output from ssGSEAProjection module.

parameters.name: input.cls.file
parameters.description: Phenotype labels. Input cls file describing phenotypes of gct file.

parameters.name: gene.sets.file
parameters.description: Gene sets database from GSEA website.  Upload a gene set if your gene set is not listed as a choice from MsigDB.

parameters.name: top.n
parameters.description: The number of gene sets to be plotted.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: The direction of correlation, as measured by mutual information, to be investigated.

parameters.name: image.format
parameters.description: The image file type of outputted plots, either bitmap (PNG) or vector graphics (PDF).

parameters.name: jaccard.threshold
parameters.description: The Jaccard index threshold above which connective edges between gene sets will be plotted.
